title: S + cannot have + p.p.（對過去的否定推測）

formulas.zh: 主詞不可能已經……（對過去強烈否定推測）
主詞不可能已經……（對過去強烈否定推測，略顯正式）

explanation: 此句型用於推測過去事件，表達「絕對不可能」的否定判斷。結構為 cannot/could not + have + 過去分詞，常用於根據現實條件推斷過去不可能發生的事。與 must have p.p.（一定已經）互為對立。注意勿與 couldn't have done it（無法完成某事）混淆；此句型強調推測而非能力限制。時態上必須用完成式，表過去已完成的動作。

examples.eng: He cannot have finished the project in just two days; it's too complex.
examples.chi: 他不可能在短短兩天內完成這個項目；它太複雜了。

examples.eng: She could not have known about the surprise party; we kept it completely secret.
examples.chi: 她不可能知道這場驚喜派對；我們完全保密了。

examples.eng: They cannot have arrived at the meeting on time with such heavy traffic yesterday.
examples.chi: 昨天交通這麼擁堵，他們不可能準時到達會議。

examples.eng: The witness could not have seen the accident clearly; it was too dark that night.
examples.chi: 那晚太黑了，目擊者不可能清楚地看到事故。

extension.tip: 與 must have p.p. 相反：cannot have 表絕對否定推測，must have 表絕對肯定推測。判斷依據常來自現實條件、時間限制、客觀事實。勿混淆「推測」（cannot have）與「無法能力」（couldn't do）。

examples.test: He cannot have written this letter; he was in hospital last week.
examples.result: → 正確：根據過去事實推測，他不可能寫了這封信

examples.test: He couldn't write this letter because his hand was injured.
examples.result: → 不同用法：表能力限制而非過去推測

examples.test: She must have finished the work. / She cannot have finished the work.
examples.result: → 對比：同一事件的肯定與否定推測，取決於證據

extension.note: 記住：cannot have = 推測過去「絕對不可能」，must have = 推測過去「一定已經」，兩者對立。

parts: arrived on time; the flight was delayed by three hours.
exercises.sentence: She cannot have arrived on time; the flight was delayed by three hours.
exercises.translation: 她不可能準時到達；航班延誤了三小時。

parts: climbed that tall tree; he was only five years old.
exercises.sentence: The child could not have climbed that tall tree; he was only five years old.
exercises.translation: 那個小孩不可能爬上那麼高的樹；他當時只有五歲。

parts: known the answer before the teacher announced it.
exercises.sentence: They cannot have known the answer before the teacher announced it.
exercises.translation: 他們不可能在老師宣布之前就知道答案。

parts: been her; I saw her in a different city at that exact moment.
exercises.sentence: It could not have been her; I saw her in a different city at that exact moment.
exercises.translation: 不可能是她；我在同一時刻在另一個城市看到了她。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 根據情境選擇正確的否定推測句型，表示過去絕對不可能發生
mc_exercises.question_eng: The theft _______ occurred at noon; the store was crowded with customers.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A「cannot have」。此句表達對過去事件的推測，意為「絕對不可能在正午發生」。B 項「could not」缺少 have，時態錯誤。C 項「must not have」表示禁止性推測而非客觀不可能。D 項「should not have」表示後悔，語意不符。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇表達對過去事件否定推測的正確形式
mc_exercises.question_eng: She _______ been to Paris before; she didn't even know where the Eiffel Tower was.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A「could not have」。此句推測過去「她絕對沒有去過巴黎」。B 項「cannot be」時態為現在式，不符合。C 項「must not have」表禁止而非推測不可能。D 項「could have not」語序錯誤，正確順序應為「could not have」。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 根據事實判斷過去情境，選擇最恰當的否定推測句型
mc_exercises.question_eng: The exam results _______ been announced yesterday; the professor told us grades would be posted today.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 B「cannot have」。根據教授所言，成績昨天絕對不可能公布，故用 cannot have 表達客觀不可能。A 項「must have」表肯定推測，與語境矛盾。C 項「would have」表過去的假設條件。D 項「might not have」表示可能性較弱，不夠確定。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 綜合分析上下文語意，判斷過去事件推測的正確否定形式
mc_exercises.question_eng: Despite the emergency contact information provided, he _______ the message in time; the network was down for hours during the critical period.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 C「could not have received」。網路中斷數小時是客觀事實，推斷他絕對不可能及時收到訊息。A 項「might have received」表可能性。B 項「must have received」表肯定推測，與事實矛盾。D 項「should have received」表應該而非推測的不可能性。此題測試 could not have（cannot have 的過去式表達）的正確用法。

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 他昨天沒來學校，他絕對不可能生病了，因為我今天看到他在籃球場。
translation_exercises.answer: He didn't come to school yesterday. He cannot have been sick because I saw him at the basketball court today.
key_points: 時態銜接：過去動作 + 現在證據
表達「絕對不可能」的推測
hints: 提示1：結構為 S + cannot + have + p.p.，此題 p.p. 為 been（表狀態）
提示2：易誤用 couldn't be sick（無法生病）或 must not have been（不一定），應強調推測的絕對否定

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 這份考卷滿分是100分，小王考了95分，他絕對不可能作弊。
translation_exercises.answer: The test was out of 100 points. Xiaowang scored 95, so he cannot have cheated.
key_points: 根據現實條件（高分）推斷過去不可能的行為
因果邏輯：結果反推過去事實
hints: 提示1：作弊 cheat，過去分詞為 cheated；結構：S + cannot + have + cheated
提示2：注意勿混淆 couldn't cheat（沒能力作弊）與 cannot have cheated（推測不可能作弊），前者涉及能力，後者涉及推測

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 這家餐廳的廚師是我的朋友，廚藝非常好，這道菜絕對不可能是他做的。
translation_exercises.answer: The chef at this restaurant is my friend, and he is very skilled. This dish cannot have been cooked by him—it tastes terrible.
key_points: cannot have + been cooked (被動完成式)
複雜結構：by + 人物代詞
推測與對比：優秀廚師 vs. 糟糕菜餚
hints: 提示1：被動結構 cannot + have + been + p.p.，此題為 been cooked；整個短語推測過去完成的被動動作
提示2：易誤用主動 cannot have cooked 或現在式 cannot be cooked，應注意過去被動完成式的完整構成

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 根據警方調查，嫌疑人在案發時在醫院接受手術，他絕對不可能是偷走那筆珠寶的人。
translation_exercises.answer: According to the police investigation, the suspect was undergoing surgery at the hospital at the time of the crime. He cannot have stolen the jewelry.
key_points: 時間對應：過去時間點的相互排斥
法律推理：時間不符 → 推測不可能的犯罪行為
hints: 提示1：盜竊 steal，過去分詞 stolen；完整結構：S + cannot + have + stolen + O
提示2：易誤用 must not have stolen（倫理判斷）或 couldn't have stolen（能力限制），應強調根據時間證據進行的邏輯推測，cannot have 是「絕對不可能」而非「禁止」或「無能力」
